original_prompt: Create mobile-first views for field operations integrating html5-qrcode for barcode scanning in appointments and stock takes. Register new views in main.js and add nav link in index.html.
rephrased_goal: Implement camera-based barcode scanning for field technicians by adding html5-qrcode library, creating touch-optimized views for mobile appointments and stock takes, and integrating them into the app's routing and navigation.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Add html5-qrcode library to index.html
subtasks_required: 1.1 Inject html5-qrcode script in <head> or before main.js
tasks.analogy_reference: bringing new magic eye to cave
tasks.testing_criteria: Library script tag exists in index.html.
File exists and contains MobileAppointmentView function with reader div.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Create Mobile Stock Take View
subtasks_required: 5.1 Create src/views/view.mobile_stock.js with continuous scanner support
tasks.testing_criteria: File exists and contains MobileStockView function with live-scan-count.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Register views in main.js and update nav
subtasks_required: 7.1 Update main.js imports and switch cases
7.2 Add mobile scanner link to index.html
tasks.testing_criteria: main.js has imports; index.html has mobile_stock data-view link.
Build success, new mobile views functional in routing.
